design_plan: rng=42; hero_math: max-width 1120px, clamp typography → 2–3 lines; AIDA checked; bento_density verified via grid-auto-flow:dense; centered hero + centered actions enforced; button contrast AA; labels sweep complete; GSAP guarded; competitors mentioned: Folk, Orchids, Siri, ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok.
headline: Super vs Orchids — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Orchids. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Orchids

summary: A fair, editorial comparison of Super and Orchids for people evaluating personal AI agents and computer‑use assistants. Orchids explores experimental automation and vibe‑coding ideas. Super is built for durable, repeated computer‑use workflows, with a reusable computer‑use cache that compounds value over time. This page places both tools in the wider landscape alongside Folk, Siri, ChatGPT, Gemini, and Grok, grounded in current reporting and market context.
